title: True Weaponry Resourcepack
description: A Necessary Resourcepack for Chalie's True Weaponry
body:
# Chalie's True Weaponry Resourcepack
This is a **Necessary** Resource pack for **[Chalie's True Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/project/chalies-true-weaponry)**, It Covers:

- Weapons Ranging from Wood to Diamond
- New Entire Sets of Tools
- Unique and "One-off" Weapons
- Different Types of Grips and Sizes to Hold
